name: Siberian experiment
short_description: Abandoned on the edge of the Siberian taiga, an old military barracks holds something more sinister than just memories of the past. A cold wind whispers through the broken windows, carrying the smell of damp and decay through the empty corridors.
detailed_description:
Abandoned on the edge of the Siberian taiga, an old military barracks holds something more sinister than just memories of the past. The cold wind whispers through the broken windows, spreading the smell of dampness and decay through the empty corridors. Here, under the cover of permafrost, secret experiments were conducted, the name of which was “Insomnia”. Their goal was to create an ideal soldier who knows neither fear, nor pain, nor fatigue. But something went wrong. Something broke free.

Here, under the cover of permafrost, secret experiments were conducted under the code name “Insomnia”. Their goal was to create the perfect soldier who knew no fear, no pain, no fatigue. But something went wrong. Something broke free, and now the barracks has become his hunting grounds.

You have to solve the mystery by solving puzzles left by mad scientists and avoiding traps set by what has broken free. Listen to the whispers... they can be both clues and sentences. Save your soul... if you can. Because in this barracks you risk losing not only your life, but also your sanity.

Game Features:

The atmosphere of real horror: Gloomy locations, eerie sounds and sudden screemers will not let you relax for a second.

Exciting story: Uncover the mystery by collecting notes, documents and audio recordings left by the participants of the experiments.

Challenging puzzles: Solve puzzles to discover new paths and get closer to solving the mystery of the barracks.

Are you ready to face your fears and immerse yourself in a world of mystical horror?

supported_languages:
English*, Russian
*languages with full audio support
